g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does MSP generate the 30-second preview clip?')
sendPrompt('What HLS bitrate ladder does MSP produce for music and podcast — low, med, high rungs?')
sendPrompt('How does Sharp optimize the cover image — what output format and dimensions?')
sendPrompt('How does Demucs stem separation work in MSP — what stems are produced and where are they stored?')

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AWS KMS sign the IPFS CID as an EIP-712 typed-data message?')
